results.title: Meet the Biggest Threat to Nvidia in AI Chips. It's Not AMD, Intel, or Broadcom.
Nvidia vs Intel vs AMD: Which AI Chip Stock Is the Best Buy in 2026?
GPU Winner 2026: Nvidia vs AMD vs Intel - Who Really Dominates AI?
This Super Semiconductor Stock Is Obliterating Nvidia, AMD, and Broadcom in 2026
Which CPU Company Has Dominated 2026: Intel, AMD, or ARM Holdings?
Why AMD Can Stay Hotter Longer Than NVIDIA
With Intel, AMD, Nvidia, and More Rising Sharply Last Week, Have Chip Stocks Become Overvalued?

summary: NVIDIA remains dominant (Data Center >$30B Q1, Blackwell/Vera Rubin projected $1T in sales 2026-2027) but faces 40% production cut from memory shortages, benefiting AMD. Intel surged +24.89% after blowout Q1, boosted by 18A chip and AI CPU demand — this Intel read-through lifted AMD. AMD is the preferred second supplier for cost-aware hyperscalers. Q4 2025 AMD Data Center revenue was $5.38B (record). Google TPU, Broadcom custom ASICs are broader competitive threats.
